title: Fix module inliner giving definition not found with MULTITOP

features.name: class_static_task_cross_module_signal_access
features.description: Code should include a class with a static task that accesses an external module signal using a hierarchical path reference (module.signal).

features.name: hierarchical_signal_increment_in_class_context
features.description: Code should include a post-increment operation on a signal accessed via hierarchical reference from within a class static method context.

features.name: multitop_lint_directive_with_module_inlining
features.description: Code should include a lint_off directive for MULTITOP placed before a module definition, which triggers a module inliner definition-not-found error.
